metadata.description: Professional Intelligence Suite - Career advancement and strategic research intelligence for professional success

plugins.name: career-intelligence-plugin
plugins.description: 🧠 Complete AI-powered career intelligence platform with content optimization, market analysis, ATS validation, and networking automation. Features Claude API integration, real-time salary benchmarking, multi-system ATS testing, and referral pathway intelligence.

plugins.name: strategic-research-intelligence
plugins.description: 🔬 Strategic research and competitive intelligence workflows. Market analysis, trend monitoring, and business intelligence for strategic decision-making.
